106 AC1K AC1K_ALC_WKLY (AC1K) Use of Alcoholic Beverages at Least Weekly CHAR 1 Customary routine: eating patterns - use of alcohol weekly. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
